findings.description: Section s1 uses `StringUtil` (via `StringUtil.isNullOrEmpty`) in its code example for handling null/empty optional fields, but `StringUtil` is not listed in the hints.
Section s4 code example uses the `@Domain` annotation on `SampleForm.name`, but `@Domain` is not listed in the hints.
Section s10 recommends a utility pattern using `BeanUtil.createAndCopy` to convert request parameters into a Bean before validation, but `BeanUtil` is not listed in the hints.
